title: erysimum crepidifolium
intro: Erysimum crepidifolium, also known as Crepidiolum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Erysimum crepidifolium include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
